Quiz Kingdom - Fundamentals - Teacher Feedback

Overall Grade: 88%

Strengths:
- Excellent answers on arrays, tuples, and interfaces.
- Good understanding of union types.

Needs attention:
- Missed 2 questions on type narrowing and inference edge cases.
- Review optional chaining and null checks.

Suggestions:
- Revisit beginner topics 4 and 5.
- Try rewriting your missed answers with short code examples.
